comment: Drift thresholds, source priorities, and account mapping for the generator. Edit to tune behavior; the reconcile module reads this at runtime.

sourcePriority.comment: Per-field, which source wins when both have a value. memo = jason_finance.md; tracker = Actual Budget; manual = static entry in src/sources/manual.js

driftThresholds.comment: Per-account-class, the absolute-dollar drift between memo and tracker before it gets logged in _drift. Investment accounts always log (any drift is signal). Manual accounts log staleness in days.

accountMapping.comment: Stub for PR-A. PR-B/C/D will populate this with the mapping between Actual account UUIDs and PL account UUIDs, since the two systems generate independent IDs.
